title: Ocean of Secrets
description: Live the life of a pirate!
body:
# Ocean of Secrets Modpack
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76d50c5fcc97712996e8d3e7230a47edc6eb84e2.png)

🏴‍☠️ **Live the Pirate Life** - Raise your Jolly Roger and dive into the ultimate pirate experience! Customize your ship, recruit a loyal crew, and arm yourself with swashbuckling gear. Fight rival pirates, evade sea monsters, and outwit dangerous traps in your quest for glory and riches.


🌏 **Explore the Unknown** - From hidden coves to massive underwater cities, the world of "Ocean of Secrets" is brimming with adventure. Encounter mysterious biomes, conquer dangerous dungeons, and unlock ancient secrets hidden in the depths. Every corner of the ocean holds a new surprise.

⚓ **Multiplayer Adventure** - Bring your crew together and sail the seas with friends! Build your fleet, raid other ships, and dominate the high seas in multiplayer mode. Work together to uncover the greatest treasures or compete to see who will reign supreme as the ultimate pirate captain.

As you start sailing through the seas, you may want to Craft your boat!
For a starting boat, it's recommended to build something similar to this-

![Boat Standing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b58416b9dc75fe02419fb619d014bd70fdd263be.gif)


**Minimum System Requirements:**
- A modern, capable PC with at least 8GB of RAM

Hoist the anchor, ready the cannons, and dive into the "Ocean of Secrets" Modpack. Will you conquer the seas and uncover its mysteries, or will the ocean’s secrets remain hidden forever? The choice is yours, captain!
